ideas.title: AI-Powered Discovery Call Qualifier
ideas.description: Automated pre-qualification tool that asks 8-10 strategic questions, scores fit, and books qualified calls automatically. Reduces wasted discovery time.

ideas.title: Freedom Audit → Calendar Integration
ideas.description: After someone completes Freedom Audit, automatically offer calendar booking for strategy call. Strike while insight is fresh.

ideas.title: Weekly Newsletter: 'One Thing'
ideas.description: Weekly email with one tactical insight, one question to consider, one resource. Low-effort, high-value touchpoint. Auto-generated from recent work/ideas.

ideas.title: Freedom Audit: Team Edition
ideas.description: Version for leadership teams - individual assessments + team dynamics layer + facilitation guide. Sell to companies at $5-15K.

ideas.title: Mini-Audit: Diagnostic Sprints
ideas.description: 5-question focused audits on specific topics: Time, Money, Relationships, Health. Free lead magnet or $97 standalone.
ideas.revenue_potential: Medium - volume play or lead gen

ideas.title: The CFO Dashboard for Founders
ideas.description: Monthly financial health dashboard - connects to Stripe/bank, generates executive summary + recommendations. $497/mo SaaS.

ideas.title: Case Study Generator
ideas.description: Tool that interviews clients (via form/AI), generates polished case study with quotes, before/after, metrics. Automates testimonial collection.

ideas.title: Freedom Audit Public Leaderboard
ideas.description: Anonymous leaderboard showing aggregate gap scores by profession, age, income bracket. Gamification + social proof.

ideas.title: AI-Powered Content Repurposing Engine
ideas.description: Take one long-form piece (session transcript, essay, video) → auto-generate Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, newsletter sections, quotes.

ideas.title: Marketing Intelligence Dashboard
ideas.description: Unified dashboard compiling stats from all social profiles (X, LinkedIn, YouTube), podcast data via Blueberry, SEO metrics (Ahrefs-style backlinks, domain rank, rankings), and ad platforms (Meta, Google Ads). Real-time view of entire marketing presence, content performance, and growth metrics in one place.
ideas.revenue_potential: Medium - internal tool, high strategic value
ideas.leverage: Eliminates checking 10+ platforms, instant marketing intelligence

ideas.title: Client Onboarding Automation
ideas.description: New client signs → auto-sends welcome sequence, contract, calendar links, prep questionnaire, Notion workspace. Zero manual work.

ideas.title: Meeting Intelligence System
ideas.description: Records calls, generates transcript + summary + action items + CRM update. Never take notes again.

ideas.title: Notion → Email Report Generator
ideas.description: Pulls data from Notion databases, generates formatted reports (client progress, metrics, insights) and emails automatically weekly/monthly.

ideas.title: SEO/GEO Agent with Built-in Dashboard
ideas.description: Autonomous SEO agent with Ahrefs-style analytics dashboard. Uses existing PR network + edge-case GEO hacks (Reddit, forums, geo-targeted content). Recursive testing and self-improvement loop - tests strategies, measures results, refines approach automatically.
ideas.revenue_potential: Very High - BPM service offering at $5-10K/mo per client
ideas.leverage: Automates 90% of SEO work, scales infinitely

ideas.title: External Listicle Site (DR Booster)
ideas.description: SEO-optimized listicle site ('Top 10 Executive Coaches', 'Best Marketing Agencies for CPG') that ranks high and naturally recommends Unbreakable Wealth, Mike Brown, and BPM. Trained LLM generates content, monitors rankings, updates based on performance.
ideas.revenue_potential: High - builds authority + generates qualified inbound leads
ideas.leverage: Passive lead generation that compounds over time

ideas.title: Endless Custom Landing Page Builder
ideas.description: Auto-generates hyper-specific landing pages for long-tail keywords. 'Best marketing agency for pet CPG brands', 'Executive coach for SaaS founders in Seattle', etc. AI writes copy, designs page, deploys automatically. Targets BPM and UW.
ideas.revenue_potential: High - captures long-tail search traffic at scale

ideas.title: Stale Ad Library Outreach
ideas.description: Scrapes Meta Ad Library for brands with old/stale ads. AI builds 3-5 fresh campaign concepts. Sends cold email: 'We noticed your ads haven't been updated in 6 months, so we built you some new campaigns. Want to see them?' Includes mockups/concepts.

ideas.title: Rebuild Their Website Cold Outreach
ideas.description: Targets local service businesses with terrible websites. AI scrapes site, rebuilds it beautifully overnight. Sends email: 'We saw your website... so we built you a new one. Here's the link. Want to keep it?' Shows, doesn't tell.
ideas.revenue_potential: High - 10-20% close rate on design/dev retainers

ideas.title: Google My Business Optimization Agent
ideas.description: Finds local businesses with incomplete/poor GMB listings. AI optimizes listing, adds photos, writes better descriptions, suggests posts. Sends before/after comparison: 'We optimized your Google listing. See the difference.' Then pitch ongoing management.

ideas.title: Anthropomorphic PR Agent
ideas.description: Fully autonomous PR agent that pitches journalists, secures podcast bookings, and gets media placements for UW and BPM. Communicates like a real human publicist via email - people think they're talking to a person. Trains on successful pitches, refines approach based on response rates.
ideas.leverage: Scales infinitely, learns and improves over time

ideas.title: Family Organizer Agent
ideas.description: Scans family email for kids' events, monitors ex-wife communication, generates transportation plans, sends updates to house manager. Calendar integration, smart conflict detection, proactive reminders. Never miss a soccer game or pickup.
ideas.revenue_potential: Low direct - massive life quality improvement
ideas.leverage: Eliminates mental load of family logistics

ideas.title: Recipe Planner & Shopping List Optimizer
ideas.description: For house manager: generates weekly meal plans based on preferences/dietary needs, creates optimized shopping lists (grouped by store section), tracks pantry inventory, suggests recipes based on what's expiring. Integrates with grocery delivery.
ideas.revenue_potential: Low direct - saves hours per week

ideas.title: Admin Tracking Dashboard for House Manager
ideas.description: Tracks all household admin: car registrations, passport renewals, insurance policies, subscriptions, warranties. Sends proactive alerts 60/30/7 days before deadlines. One dashboard showing everything that needs attention. Never scramble for expired docs again.
ideas.leverage: Peace of mind, no admin fires

ideas.title: Nightly Research Project Agent
ideas.description: Deep research agent that investigates potential builds while you sleep. Input: 'Should I build a Polymarket arb bot?' Output: full analysis including technical difficulty, market opportunity, revenue projections, SWOT, competitive landscape, time-to-market. Wakes up with a complete brief.

ideas.title: AI Coach Experiment: Accountability Bot
ideas.description: Daily check-in bot that asks about commitments, tracks progress, sends gentle nudges. Test if people want AI accountability.

ideas.title: Voice Note → Structured Insight
ideas.description: Speak thoughts into phone → AI transcribes, structures, categorizes, adds to personal knowledge base. Capture fleeting ideas.

backlog_ideas: Client portal with session notes + resources
Automated LinkedIn post scheduler with AI variations
